trades.reasoning: Score 95 with RSI 62.3 squarely in the bullish zone, MACD bullish crossover with rising histogram, and price 5.6% above SMA-20 — semiconductor equipment names tend to lead recoveries.
Score 95 with RSI 67.4 at upper end of bullish zone, full MACD confirmation, and low share price allows efficient use of remaining cash.

decisions.briefing: Markets drifted slightly lower today — NASDAQ -0.5%, S&P -0.3% — a neutral, low-conviction session with no major catalyst. The portfolio sits at +24.6% and has 4 open slots with $843 cash, so deploying into two score-95 momentum names: ACMR (semiconductor equipment) and RXO (logistics/transportation). Both show full MACD bullish confirmation and RSI in the healthy 55–70 range, avoiding the overbought names like INVX (RSI 90) and CMBT (RSI 87).

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities edged lower Tuesday as the S&P 500 slipped 0.3% and the NASDAQ fell 0.5%, reflecting a broadly cautious tone with no major macro catalysts to drive direction. Tech and growth names faced mild headwinds as investors digested recent gains and awaited fresh earnings or economic data. The session's low-volume drift suggests institutional players are in a wait-and-see posture ahead of upcoming Fed commentary.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股週二小幅收低，標普500指數下跌0.3%，納斯達克下跌0.5%，整體市場氣氛偏謹慎，缺乏明確的宏觀催化劑推動方向。科技與成長股承受輕微拋壓，投資者消化近期漲幅之餘，靜待新一輪財報或經濟數據。成交量清淡，顯示機構資金仍處於觀望態勢，等候聯儲局官員最新表態。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum investing means buying stocks that have been rising and showing strong technical signals — like a rising RSI, MACD crossovers, and price above the moving average — on the theory that stocks trending upward tend to keep moving that way in the short term. Today's two buys (ACMR and RXO) were selected purely on momentum signals, not valuation. The risk is that momentum can reverse sharply, which is why stop-losses (-7%) are essential.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動能投資策略是指買入技術指標持續走強的股票——例如RSI上升、MACD出現黃金交叉、股價站上移動平均線——理論基礎是短期內趨勢往往具有延續性。今日買入的ACMR與RXO，均以動能訊號為主要依據，而非估值考量。此策略的風險在於動能可能急速逆轉，因此設置-7%的止損單至關重要。
